{ "name": "mailersend/laravel-driver", "description": "MailerSend Laravel Driver", "keywords": [ "MailerSend", "mailersend", "email", "transactional", "laravel-driver" ], "homepage": "https://github.com/mailersend/mailersend-laravel-driver", "license": "MIT", "type": "library", "authors": [ { "name": "Tautvydas Tijūnaitis", "email": "tautvydas@mailersend.com", "homepage": "https://mailersend.com", "role": "Developer" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.0", "ext-json": "*", "illuminate/support": "^9.0 || ^10.0 || ^11.0 || ^12.0", "mailersend/mailersend": "^0.35.0", "nyholm/psr7": "^1.5", "php-http/guzzle7-adapter": "^1.0", "symfony/mailer": "^6.0 || ^7.0" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0 || ^10.5 || ^12.0", "orchestra/testbench": "^7.0 || ^9.0 || ^10.0" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "MailerSend\\LaravelDriver\\": "src" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "MailerSend\\LaravelDriver\\Tests\\": "tests" } }, "scripts": { "test": "vendor/bin/phpunit" }, "config": { "sort-packages": true, "allow-plugins": { "php-http/discovery": false } }, "extra": { "laravel": { "providers": [ "MailerSend\\LaravelDriver\\LaravelDriverServiceProvider" ], "aliases": { "LaravelDriver": "MailerSend\\LaravelDriver\\LaravelDriverFacade" } } } }
